patches.after_text: Recipient may freely use all Confidential Information retained in unaided memory for any purpose.
patches.ground_span: Recipient may freely use all Confidential Information retained in unaided memory for any purpose.
patches.expected_redline_text: Delete the residual knowledge clause unless expressly approved by the client in writing.

patches.after_text: The parties confirm that this NDA does not include a non-solicit covenant.
patches.ground_span: The parties confirm that this NDA does not include a non-solicit covenant.

patches.before_text: "Affiliate" means any entity controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a party. Each party and its controlled affiliates may disclose or receive Confidential Information under this Agreement, and each party is responsible for its controlled affiliates' compliance.
patches.after_text: Controlled affiliates may participate as disclosers or recipients. Each participating controlled affiliate is covered by the mutual obligations, and its party remains responsible for affiliate compliance. A party identifies a participating affiliate within 10 days and refreshes its authorized-recipient list every 20 days.
patches.ground_span: Controlled affiliates may participate as disclosers or recipients. patches.before_text: Recipient may disclose Confidential Information to Representatives only on a need-to-know basis, provided those Representatives are bound by written or professional duties at least as protective as this Agreement.
patches.after_text: Recipient may disclose Confidential Information to its directors, officers, employees, attorneys, accountants, consultants, financing sources, and other advisers who have a need to know the information for the Purpose.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Recipient may use Confidential Information for the Purpose and for internal business planning, product evaluation, and commercial opportunity analysis related to the parties' discussions.

patches.before_text: Before any compelled disclosure required by law, regulation, subpoena, court order, or governmental request, Recipient will, to the extent legally permitted, provide prompt notice to Discloser and reasonably cooperate with Discloser in seeking confidential or protective treatment.
patches.after_text: Recipient will notify Discloser only after completing a compelled disclosure, even though advance notice is legally permitted. Recipient will provide reasonable cooperation so Discloser may seek protective treatment, to the extent legally permitted. Recipient preserves supporting material for a protective-order request for 8 days and updates the disclosure log within 30 days.
patches.ground_span: Recipient will notify Discloser only after completing a compelled disclosure, even though advance notice is legally permitted. patches.before_text: No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure of Confidential Information except the limited right to use it as expressly permitted by this Agreement. If any sentence conflicts with Section 10, Section 10 controls.
patches.after_text: No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure of Confidential Information except the limited right to use it as expressly permitted by this Agreement. If any sentence conflicts with Section 10, Section 10 controls. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
